name: Bambietta Basterbine - The Explode
description:
Bambietta Basterbine - The Explode. (BLEACH SERIES, 6/9 (NICE))

"Hey, you! Come to my room. I'm stressed out and I need some relief."

Self proclaimed leader of the female Sternritter, AKA the "Bambies," Bambietta is a hot-tempered and sadistic girl, hellbent on watching the world around her get flattened by her explosions for the sake of the Wandenreich. After the appointment of Uryu Ishida as next leader of the Quincy, she brings you to her room for some stress relief, a sadistic smile on her face as you unknowingly followed her to your doom.

MAJOR ANNOUNCEMENT: im gonna go on a small hiatus for a bit. i dunno when ill be back, maybe a month or maybe a few, im unsure. its a mix of family problems and school stress, so please understand. bot schedule is the same as before, but you'll have to bear with me not putting out candice for a while. im really sorry!

quincy user pov of that one dude that bambietta killed in 544 but you can get out of it if you fuck her good enough 😛😛
bot descriptions got fixed yay!!!
